newFeatures.title: Stream Processor v0.6.3
description: The new version `v0.6.3` of the _Stream Processor_ is available!

This version introduces configurable [Custom Partitioner](/docs/products/fast_data_v2/stream_processor/usage#custom-partitioner) support for the Kafka producer, including the new `lowerHalf` and `upperHalf` partition selection values.

This feature enables the implementation of efficient architectural patterns and best practices to optimize [Initial Load and Full Refresh](/docs/products/fast_data_v2/best_practices/initial_load_full_refresh) processes while ensuring Near Real Time operational continuity.
Check the service [changelog](/docs/products/fast_data_v2/stream_processor/changelog) for the full list of changes.

improvements.title: Fast Data Control Plane v2 Application
description: The new versions of Fast Data Control Plane v2 services are available: `v0.2.0-mongodb` (and `v0.2.0`) of the _Control Plane_ service, and `v0.2.0` of the _Control Plane Frontend_ service.
By upgrading to these versions, Fast Data users can benefit from the following improvements:
- Consumer lag is now easily accessible in the UI, with execution steps that start acquiring lag visually highlighted in the Control Plane canvas
- In case of multiple replicas for a workload, the reported lag is now calculated as the sum of all replicas lag feedback, providing a more accurate representation of the overall lag status
- A warning icon now highlights when partition info is missing from workload feedback.
- It has been fixed a bug that caused the impossibility to send control actions to a workload in case its consumer groupId was changed
- Stream Processor partition settings are now displayed among the details of a Process step
For more information about service latest versions, check out the [compatibility matrix](/docs/products/fast_data_v2/runtime_management/compatibility_matrix#service-latest-versions).

improvements.title: Farm Data v0.6.2
description: The new version `v0.6.2` of _Farm Data_ is available with dependency updates.
Check the service [changelog](/docs/products/fast_data_v2/farm_data/changelog) for the full list of changes.

improvements.title: Kango v0.6.2
description: The new version `v0.6.2` of _Kango_ is available with build and CI pipeline fixes.
Check the service [changelog](/docs/products/fast_data_v2/kango/changelog) for the full list of changes.
